sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15857" key="*)arxebou/leion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἀρχεβούλειον</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέτρον</foreign> metre used by Archebulus, <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">̆̆̄̆̆̄̆̆̄</pron> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">̆̆̄̆̄̄</pron>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:8:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.9</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
